Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Per-job CC ratings, records, badges, and an opt-in ladder.
Description: Tracks Casual and Ranked CC ratings per job, lifetime records, role streak badges, and an optional community leaderboard. Use /cjr.
Changelog: Replaces editable leaderboard aliases with the logged-in character's full name and Home World. Joining remains optional, sharing is bound to that character, and switching characters pauses uploads. Old alias credentials and queued uploads are cleared once; local ratings, match history, records, and badges are preserved.
